name: cb
description: Use Carbon Black endpoints as targets using Live Response.

name: dir
description: Load a directory as a filesystem.

name: kape
description: Load KAPE forensic image format files.

name: log
description: Load separate log files without a target.

name: mqtt
description: Load remote targets through a broker.

name: multiraw
description: Load multiple raw containers as a single target (i.e. a multi-disk system).

name: proxmox
description: Loader for Proxmox VM configuration files.

name: raw
description: Load raw container files such as disk images.

name: remote
description: Load a remote target that runs a compatible Dissect agent.

name: smb
description: Use remote SMB servers as targets.

name: tanium
description: Load Tanium forensic image format files.

name: velociraptor
description: Load Rapid7 Velociraptor forensic image files.

name: vma
description: Load Proxmox Virtual Machine Archive (VMA) files.

name: vmx
description: Load VMware virtual machine configuration (VMX) files.

name: xva
description: Load Citrix Hypervisor XVA format files.
